creator: tg@ihf.rwth-aachen.de
text:
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com> writes:

> >Fix:
> -MD5 (sketch-0.6.0.tar.gz) = 82641a8575e71c0ea9d23b3fe85c1594
> +MD5 (sketch-0.6.0.tar.gz) = b879f91569943b432a9696518ff56a59

sketch:150) make fetch
>> sketch-0.6.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist on this system.
>> Attempting to fetch from http://www.online.de/home/sketch/.
Receiving sketch-0.6.0.tar.gz (706274 bytes): 100%
706274 bytes transfered in 104.3 seconds  (6.61 Kbytes/s)
sketch:151) md5 /usr/ports/distfiles/sketch-0.6.0.tar.gz 
MD5 (/usr/ports/distfiles/sketch-0.6.0.tar.gz) = 82641a8575e71c0ea9d23b3fe85c1594

> It should be noted that I had a problem getting the other programs
> required by sketch-0.6.0 due to md5 checksum mismatches.

Maybe you should start looking for problems with your network
connection. The distfiles for sketch don't appear to have changed.

tg
